data.title: QXO Announces Cash Tender Offers and Consent Solicitations for Any and All of TopBuild Corp.’s 4.125% Senior Notes due 2032 and 5.625% Senior Notes due 2034
data.description: In Greenwich, Connecticut, QXO, Inc. disclosed its plan to acquire TopBuild Corp., commencing tender offers through its subsidiary Titanium MergerCo, Inc., to buy all outstanding 4.125% Senior Notes due 2032 and 5.625% Senior Notes due 2034. The offer includes purchasing any and all of the 2032 Notes and 2034 Notes for cash. This move comes following the announcement made by QXO on the NYSE (QXO) regarding the pending acquisition.

data.title: Recursion Reports Grant of Inducement Awards as Permitted by the Nasdaq Listing Rules
data.description: On May 26, 2026, Recursion, a renowned clinical stage TechBio company, revealed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors sanctioned the provision of inducement restricted stock unit (RSU) awards. These awards encompassed 2,991,840 shares of its class A common stock, distributed among 33 fresh recruits. This action was taken under Recursion's 2024 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. Each award was given as an inducement pivotal to the initiation of employment with Recursion or its subsidiary, in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky seeks to vacate 12-year crypto fraud sentence due to legal issue connected to Sam Bankman-Fried.
data.description: Entrepreneur Alex Mashinsky, founder and ex-CEO of Celsius, is seeking to overturn his prison term, citing a legal issue linked to Sam Bankman-Fried. Mashinsky aims to have his sentence revoked based on this conflict. This development has garnered attention due to the involvement of two prominent figures in the crypto industry. The number of years in Mashinsky's sentence, as well as specific details about the legal conflict and the potential implications of vacating the sentence, have not been disclosed.

data.title: Essex Property Trust to Present at The 2026 Nareit REITweek Conference
data.description: SAN MATEO, Calif. - Today, Essex Property Trust, Inc. disclosed that Angela L. Kleiman, President and CEO, is set to take part in a roundtable discussion at the 2026 Nareit REITweek Conference on June 3, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time. For those interested in tuning in to the panel, access can be gained through the webcast link on the Company’s Investors website at www.essex.com. Following the event, a recording of the webcast will be accessible for thirty days.

data.title: Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds Announce Distribution Payment Details
data.description: On May 29, 2026, the Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds collectively known as ASGI, THQ, and THW, declared distributions. The distributions were paid on a per share basis to all shareholders.

data.title: indie Announces New Employee Inducement Grants
data.description: A California-based automotive solutions company, indie Semiconductor (Nasdaq: INDI), revealed the issuance of equity awards, termed as "Inducement Grants", within the purview of its 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan. These awards were bestowed upon fresh recruits who recently became part of the indie team. The Compensation Committee of indie Semiconductor's Board of Directors had sanctioned these grants. Further insights on these equity awards can be accessed through the corporate investor relations page at https://investors.ind.

data.title: Aspen Snowmass Remains Open for Business During Temporary Aspen/Pitkin County Airport Closure in Summer 2027
data.description: In light of the temporary closure of Aspen/Pitkin County Airport (ASE) next summer, Aspen Snowmass along with the local businesses, lodging properties, restaurants, and event venues will continue to operate smoothly. The closure is scheduled to take place from May 29, 2026, and the community is determined to remain open despite this disruption. This decision ensures that the region's thriving economy and tourism industry can continue to thrive, even during the airport's shutdown. The closure period is expected to last for an undisclosed duration, but all necessary measures have been taken to minimize any adverse impacts on the local businesses and services.

data.title: Notice of Settlement of Shareholder Derivative Actions
data.description: On May 29, 2026, Olaplex Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: OLPX) made a public statement in compliance with a directive from the U.S. District Court for the Central District of California.
